buildCommand: pnpm --filter @workspace/mascot-app run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const src=path.join(process.cwd(),'artifacts/mascot-app/dist/public');const dst=path.join(process.cwd(),'public');if(!fs.existsSync(src)){console.error('ERROR: Source not found:',src);process.exit(1);}if(fs.existsSync(dst))fs.rmSync(dst,{recursive:true});fs.cpSync(src,dst,{recursive:true});console.log('✓ Build output copied to public');"
